name: Texas Spaghetti
recipeIngredient: 4 Chicken breasts, boned and skinned ... seasoned and then poached, chop, put aside
2 lb Spaghetti per 4 chicken breasts ... cook according to package directions and reserve
recipeInstructions:
1. Use the poaching water for cooking the spaghetti as directed on the package.
2. Cube a 2 lb block of Velveeta or similar cheese product.
3. Add 1 can of Rotel Tomatoes (with green chiles) to the cooked spaghetti in the pot.
4. Mix all ingredients together and spread evenly in a 13 x 9 inch baking dish.
5. Cover with foil and bake until the chicken and spaghetti are heated through, approximately 20 minutes.
6. Optional: Add chopped green onions and other garnishes for crunch and color.
